title: トーセンジョーダン登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan is bit of a ditz. Because of that, her
teachers often get the wrong idea about her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But her friends know that, despite being held
back by her fragile toenails, she wants to win and
works harder than anyone to that end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And then there are those who, for unknown
reasons, enjoy confusing Jordan with their antics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, Tosen Jordan and I are ready to
begin our journey to take on the Twinkle Series!
